reason: The admin module is intentionally platform-level, not tenant-scoped. Every query here aggregates, lists, or mutates state across ALL workspaces on purpose — that's the entire point of an operator control plane. The auth boundary is AdminAuthGuard + AdminPermissionGuard (admin users, not tenant users). Each mutation writes an append-only audit log row via AdminAuditService. See docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-15-adm-kloel-*.md.
